entry.title: failed to load View1.controller.js after deploy the changes in Dev System (100)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We have deployed the fiori app using eclipse, we are able to see created TR in dev system (100) also the changes done in view and controller file using se80 tcode. But, when we try to run the app in dev system (100) screen not loaded and below error generates in console. Request you to please suggest solution, thank you in advance.

"failed to load 'namespace/appname/controller/View1.controller.js' from /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20200902073900~/namespace/appname/controller/View1.controller.js" 

Note : For confidentiality we have not mentioned the namespace and app name.

entry.title: Re: Create Alternate GL Hierarchies in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@DBalinski 

You will need alternate hierarchies only. There is no way you can rollup the same base member to 2 different nodes within a single hierarchy.

On a side note, If I remember correctly this behavior is same in BPC standard so not sure how was this easy in BPC. In BPC 1 leaf member could rollup to a single node in PARENTH1 column.

Nikhil

entry.title: FM to assign existing maintenance items to a dummy maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently starting to archive the maintenance plans, but there are bigger numbers of maintenance items that does not have a plan. By SAP's advice, a dummy plan should be assigned to these items so it can be archived.

I tried testing the existing FMs like to no avail:

  • MPLAN_READ
  • MPLAN_ITEM_READ
  • MPLAN_CHANGE
  • MPLAN_ITEM_CHANGE

I also tested MCH01, but its also not working.

entry.title: Re: FSM Activity Detail Screen Not Showing Skills
entry.content:
It appears there’s an inconsistency in how skills are displayed between the Dispatching Board tab and the Activities tab under the Planning and Dispatching menu in FSM. Skills show correctly on the Dispatching Board but are missing under the Activities tab. This could possibly be a bug and should be reported to your support team for further investigation.

In the meantime, it’s recommended to cross-check the required skills under the Dispatching Board tab. For more information, feel free to reach out. If you’re interested in hair food oil 30, I can also provide recommendations!

entry.title: SAP Retail(EHP6 FOR SAP ERP 6.0) POS Documents 251(MoveType) BOM issue
entry.content:
Dear all,help me:

Sap Retaill POS Sales IDOC  data Post by MoveType 251,Unable to obtain BOM data for the correct mill。

May I ask where to configure it, or is it a bug in itself?

Attached Our Sap data：

1、Material 20000139 Bom，Valid From 2024-08-15 to 9999-12-31:

2、Sap Retail Sales Idoc Post Documents  (by IDOC Message type WPUUMS),Post Date:2024-08-16

The Move type 317 here should only deduct BOM component 20000178, how could 20000513、20000514 also deduct？Is this because the system is not configured correctly, or does the retail system not support BOM validity period management？But I use tcode MB11,MoveType 251,The generated material voucher is normal and can correctly deduct materials according to the validity period of the BOM。

3、Sap Retail SD Idoc Data：

3.1 WE20

3.2 POS Interface/InBound/Aggregated Sales Control:

What is “Explode Art” used to control? I made the same mistake in my choice。

3.4 BD87 Data

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: failed to load View1.controller.js after deploy the c...
entry.content: just that two line error info? eclipse for ui5 dev is long gone, why you use that?

entry.title: Re: Business case of cProjects
entry.content:
cProjects (part of the PPM solution) were specifically designed around IT and R&D (NPD-new product development).  They are structured with Phases and Tasks (and roles, milestones, checklists, etc.). cProjects plan, schedule, and manage projects but you can't post actual costs to them.  PPM integrates with core ERP PS by creating a parallel WBS only project so actual costs can be collected.  Actuals are passed to PPM for reporting so it's invisible to the user.

One difference with PS is that cProjects can't create material (components) demands or PRs like PS can.

Look here for more:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/db719753e69f4e8eb9902aaea0fd8471/49d254c3590b3f82e10000000a421138.html

entry.title: Re: SAP BW 7.5 to SAP Datasphere: Why It’s Time to Skip SAP BW/4HANA and Embedded Analytics
entry.content: i don't think you want to skip embedded analytics.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2024
entry.content:
Dear Vedaj_r,

On the weekend (August 17th/18th) there are two different LM events:

- all systems which did not belong to the pre-upgrade will be upgraded from 2405 to 2408 HFC3

- all systems which did belong to the pre-upgrade are already running on 2408 HFC2. These systems will get an update from 2408 HFC2 to 2408 HFC3

At  the end of the weekend all systems are on 2408 HFC3, i.e. all systems are on the same status. 

I hope I have explained it for you. In case of further questions please contact me again. 

Regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: How to put the BPM Governance Building Blocks to good use
entry.content:
Often the sales process reduces the adoption process to "we'll figure it out" as the cost of software squeezes out the cost of adoption.

This is a sure way to not realize the value of the important asset you just purchased.  

If you're buying SAP Signavio it becomes crucial to adopt using the tools as part of your overall corporate Business Process Management.   

If you don't have a mature well managed and motivated BPM organization, then you need to set up some form of Business Process Management for governance of standards and quality.  Especially with SAP Signavio, as it's true value is full lifecycle management.  With each step depending on the quality of the step before.

With that in mind, Taryn's series on establishing BPM for your enterprise is invaluable.  

I've used it in the field under a range of customer maturity and it has always yielded happier customers and a disproportionate ROI.

Major Prasanna

entry.title: Can we achieve delivery related billing in Customer advance invoice process using Billing plan
entry.content:
Hi All

We implemented Customer invoice invoice process using Billing plan. It is working fine when full delivery takes place where as when partial delivery takes place the billing qty is copying from Sales Order where they need the billed qty equal lent to delivered qty. 

Process steps:

1. VA01- with billing plan

2. VF01- FAZ - down payment request

3. F-29- Post the down payment

4. Vl01N- Delivery

5. SD final invoice (F2)

There is no issue when single delivery and single invoice because when they are creating invoice system copies the order qty i.e. 10.

where as when partial delivery takes place they create partial invoice in this case also system is copying the full order qty i.e. 10 which is incorrect as the partial delivery qty is 4 out of order qty 10.

next time when remaining delivery qty i.e. 6 is delivered user creates invoice for the 3rd billing plan and system is copying the full order qty i.e. 10. However in both the cases the net value is perfectly fine as it is copying the respective billing plan amount into Billing document.

you can see the partial invoice for 4 delivery qty but in invoice qty = 10

and final delivery is for 6 qty but invoice qty copyiing it from SO 10 qty  However net value is ok.

 

So Business requirement is system should allow to create invoice with ref to delivery so correct delivery qty is copied or at least system should allow to change the invoice qty manually while creating so they can modify the invoice qty according to delivery qty.

Other Information:

Since the billing plan is maintained system does not allow the billing relavance other than I

I searched in Google, found some helpful links but that did not help me to resolve my requirement.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: UNKNOW ERROR building web app

entry.title: Re: Two different DM Custom View Plugins are mistakenly c...
entry.content:
Hi MaxSte,

There are few incorrect statements in your question so let me see if I can clear them up for you. 😎 Firstly yes you are allowed to have multiple instances of the same plugin in a POD at the same time however you have to enable a configuration in your custom plugin to allow that to happen. If you go to your components.json file in the designer folder you will see there is a setting called "allowMultipleInstances" which is false by default, set this to true and you can have as many instances of the same plugin as you want.

Secondly the name of the plugin that is displayed in the POD designer doesnt come from the application namespace or from the name that you give it in the service registry, it uses the "title" inside the i18n/builder.properties file and from your screenshots and description I would guess that its the same in both your applications so the POD framework thinks its the same app.

Hope this info helps you.

Thanks

Kevin

PS if you are using my yoman generator tool to create your blank plugin in the first place you will find that one of the questions it asks is do you want to support multiple instances 😉

entry.title: Re: SAP DM User concept on shop floor
entry.content:
There is as always no straight answer to the question other than it depends on your exact requirements particularly in regards to traceability. For example if you want traceability of who did what then the operators will have to log in using unique accounts otherwise you cannot have traceability. If this level of traceability is not required then you could consider using a generic account but this will mean you will lose certain functionality such as time tracking , labor scheduling etc.

Yes I agree it is often very difficult for operators to keep logging into a system especially if they move from one work station to another. When I used to work for a living (before becoming a consultant lol) in a real factory I overcame that issue using "zero clients" (https://www.techtarget.com/searchvirtualdesktop/definition/zero-client) rather than PCs on the shop floor, this meant that the operators desktop would move from station to station with them. This worked really well and several other of our factories copied the approach.

Hope this helps

Thanks

Kevin

entry.title: Alert for Open Sales Quotation Does not Appear When Creating a Sales Order
entry.content:
When using the "Manage Sales Orders V2" app no alert is triggered for open sales quotations. I have changed the configuration to check at a header level. It works fine in the "Manage Sales Order" app but not in the V2 app.

Please help.
Thanks David

entry.title: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Understanding Roles And Responsibility
entry.content:
As an SAP Enterprise Architect, one of the most common discussions we have with customers is about the scope of SAP and that of the Customer when adapting RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. To help facilitate these discussions, SAP provides several useful resources, including the Onboarding Resource Centre, the Roles and Responsibilities document, and the Roadmap Viewer.

1. Onboarding Resource Centre - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

2. Roles and Responsibilities - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

3. Roadmap Viewer - RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

When moving to RISE with SAP, it's important to understand the roles and responsibilities of both SAP and the customer. SAP's basic 'Standard Service' is provided by SAP's Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS). However, the customer or their System Integrator can deliver all other services marked as 'Optional', 'Additional', and 'Cloud Application Service' in the Roles & Responsibilities documentation. If the customer chooses, SAP can also deliver these services, but in most cases, the SI Partner or Customer IT teams prefer to handle these responsibilities.

 

It's important to note that not all tasks or services listed in the Roles & Responsibilities document are relevant to all customer environments. Infrastructure-related services may vary depending on the deployed infrastructure platform (e.g. Hyperscaler). Certain tasks or services may not be available from SAP or certain SAP third-party providers and may not be available in certain regions. The availability of a specific service may also depend on the characteristics of the specific customer situation (e.g. system size, solution scope, etc.) and must be individually checked and confirmed with an SAP Cloud Architect Advisor (CAA), an SAP Client Delivery Manager (CDM), or with the Private Cloud customer centre team and the Partner Cloud Architect (PCA) from the System Integrator.

For more detailed information and task planning, SAP provides a PDF and Excel version of the Roles & Responsibilities document, available at https://www.sap.com/about/agreements/policies/hec-services.html. The Excel version is particularly useful for scope understanding, task analysis, task planning, and overall program task management purposes.

entry.title: What is the best way to generate FINITE schedule using PPDS heuristics for 3 level BOM and fix peg
entry.content:
I have 3 level BOM (FG-->Semi level 1 - Semi level 2) 

I am running PPDS heuristics in following order in S4 (eppds) 1809

1. SAP_PP_LLC (stage numbering)

2. Product planning (Comp acc Llevl Code)  - ie.MRP run

3. and then SAP_PP_019 (fix pegging)

Then 

4. Run Sequence bottom level using setup group using copy of sequencing heuristics

5. Run Bottom up (SAP_PP_009) at Semi level 2

6. Run Stable forward heuristics (SAP_DS_01) for generating finite schedule 

(Tried to run step 6 before 5 also)   

But NOT getting finite schedule and some orders are thrown out of PPDS horizon (one year out) although there is a lot of capacity before that ...some resources are still overloaded  (btw all resources are defined fully restricted finite)

Fixed pegging is active in global customization and turned for products and setting in heuristics to consider it

Any ideas?

I am ok trying a different heuristics as long as I get finite schedule

Please suggest some options

 

Thanks

NK

Can anyone help? 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/rfq-form-doesn-t-provide-the-required-fields-for-item-and-header-notes/qaq-p/12764272#M4158558

entry.title: Re: Fixing Screenshot Size and Border while publishing si...
entry.content: You can change the default for that property in Authoring Settings > Macro Initialization Defaults > Special Macros > Screen > Documentation > Image Size.

entry.title: Re: Synchronize, Check Out, Update & Load
entry.content:
• Synchronize Workarea: Check the server for new versions of all objects you have set as 'applicable for synchronization'.
  • Check Out Objects: Select objects to be 'applicable for synchronization'.
  • Update from Server: Get the latest copy of the object from the server.
  • Load from Server: Start synchronizing an object you have previously said you don't want to synchronize but that is a child of an object you are currently synchronizing.

entry.title: Re: Exporting contents
entry.content: Export will create a .dkp (that you can then import into another Workarea/instance). You're better off doing this from Producer, not Manager, especially if there are related resources / referenced objects you may also need to include in the .dkp.

entry.title: Re: Read BW BEX Query from ABAP using FM RRW3_GET_QUERY_V...
entry.content: Try using the variable name instead of the InfoObject name in i_t_parameter. And make sure that you use the newer LBA class and not the older function module. Take a look at a very good example here: How to replace RRW3_GET_QUERY_VIEW_DATA

entry.title: Re: Notification on SAP PM
entry.content:
You could create sever such PENDING status with corresponding additional info

- PENDING - Need complete shutdown
- PENDING - Need partial shutdown...
- ...

Alternatively you could create on 'main' PENDING status (numberd) and several unnumbered addl. Status for the subdivision via reasons


To 'classify' you could also use Classification in addition to the PENDING status or work with classification compltely

entry.title: Planning of materials provided to Subcon Vendor at MRP Area level
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requriement, the planning of components that are provided to a subcontracting Vendor should be planned seperately at different MRP area level. Detailed explanation is as follows,

  1. A finished material (FG123) has a BOM component (SFG123) that undergoes material subcontracting process.
  2. The Finished material (FG123) is produced in two differnent MRP Area (1234_A &1234_B) which is of type 02 (Storage Location MRP Area).
  3. The Dependent Requirement of SFG123 will also be generated at each MRP area seperately.
  4. Post MRP Run, the Subcon PR for SFG123 will be generated at each MRP Area.
  5. The Subcontractor requirements of the Material provided (SubReq) of the components that are provided to the vendor is only generated at plant level and not at each MRP Area level, hence the procurement will also be done only at plant level.

The business requriement is to generate the SubReq seperately at each MRP Area level and the subsequent procurement proposal for RM123 to be generated at S.Loc MRP Area seperately and not at the Plant MRP Area level.

Pls let me know if it is possible to create SubReq and PR at MRP Area for RM123.

 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: 🇦🇹 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Vienna, Austria)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

Location

Vienna, Austria (Tietoevry Austria, Handelskai 94-96, Millennium Tower, 40th floor, 1200 Vienna, Austria)

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • We would like also to invite you to join the official Group for Vienna in SAP Community where you can find latest SAP relevant news and events for the Vienna community https://community.sap.com/t5/wien/gh-p/wien
  • Thank you to Tietoevry for hosting

Date

Monday, October 28, 2024, from 9:00 to 16:00 local time in Vienna, Austria (CET, Central European Time)

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language

English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates Rekha DR and Daniel Wroblewski

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. After 30 signups, you can still sign up and you will be placed on a waiting list.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam (take about 1 hour)

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:

kind Regards,
Matthias Lakämper

entry.title: Re: Notification on SAP PM
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to use notification task. You can use it as outstanding action with related status.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi,

Task Completed 🙂

Thanks,
Nandhini Thanikachalam.

entry.title: Re: How to identify link between rows Goods receipt to Go...
entry.content:
Hi All,

A field in Goods Issue is available to link production goods receipts only for Blackflush.

Filed in "RelatedEnt", and "RelatedTyp" from OIGE 

You can use the below query to link the Good issue to the Production good receipt 

SELECT A."RelatedEnt", A."RelatedTyp", B."DocNum" FROM OIGE A
INNER JOIN OIGN B ON B."DocEntry"=A."RelatedEnt" AND B."ObjType"=A."RelatedTyp"
WHERE A."DocEntry"=1322

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Values in Fiori Elements Value Help
entry.content: Any suggestions, when i am using the backend odata service for filters in sap fiori, the values are duplicated but when i am using local db or hana db i was able to create views on the DB and get the distinct records

entry.title: 🇨🇭 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Lucerne, Switzerland)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

Location

Lucerne, Switzerland (Pure Consulting, Europapl. 1, 6003 Luzern, Schweiz) 

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • We would like also to invite you to official Group for Lucerne in the SAP Community where you can find latest SAP relevant news and events for the Lucerne community: https://community.sap.com/t5/luzern/gh-p/luzern
  • Thank you to Pure Consulting for hosting

Date

Monday, October 30, 2024, from 9:00 to 16:00 local time in Lucerne, Switzerland (CET, Central European Time)

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language

English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates Rekha DR and Daniel Wroblewski

Please note that spaces are limited to 26. 

  • If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. After 30 signups, you can still sign up and you will be placed on a waiting list.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load an unsigned component.ORACLE12\Client64\bin\OCI
entry.content:
Hi,

  We have upgraded the SAP BO IDT from 4.3 SP3 Patch 7 to 4.3 SP3 Patch 11. However, when opening to objects that uses the Oracle connection, we are prompted the error message "Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load an unsigned component ORACLE12\Client64\bin\OCl.dll". The error will not happen if the IDT is 'Run as Administrator'. Note that we are using Oracle instant client. Anyone has experienced this? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,
I am an MBA student from Pakistan, currently pursuing SAP Training from an SAP Gold Partner. I have completed the SAP learning journey for implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and exploring SAP Cloud ERP. I am eager to enhance my skills further through this initiative, as it aligns perfectly with my career aspirations within the SAP ecosystem.

Regards

Ahmed Rajpoot

entry.title: Re: failed to load View1.controller.js after deploy the c...
entry.content:
Hello junwu,

Yes we are receiving the above two line error info. more information to the issue is that, when we check the app in inspect mode, we are able to see loaded metadata of the application also the View1.view.xml and changes done in the View1.view.xml file.

But, the View1.controller.js file is in red color and on click on that file code not loaded just that two error line display. We have Eclipse Older version at client site and we are using it for deployment purpose.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Thanks for detailed information. I was able to complete the steps above, but when i try to hit the URL, I get the following error. I am able to hit the https://localhost:9002/occ/v2/basesites?fields=FULL and get response separately. Any help or suggestions is appreciated.

My local running with 2211.27 Commerce and 2211.27 Composable Storefront

-thanks,

Kiran

Watch mode enabled. Watching for file changes...

  ➜  Local:   http://localhost:4200/

  ➜  press h + enter to show help

An unknown http error occurred

Http failure response for https://localhost:9002/occ/v2/basesites?fields=FULL: 0 undefined

Regards

entry.title: Re: Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load an unsigned component.ORACLE12\Client64\bin
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites, it's reserved to issues with SAP Community, Support and so on. Better post to Technology Q&A (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions). Hopefully, an admin would fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Automatic transfer of master data when creating and c...
entry.content: Hi Manoel, thanks for your advice. But to what extent can we automate the transfer of production master data and transaction data in Create and Change using filter criteria? As far as I know, it is still necessary to manually trigger the transfer with DRFOUT. BR, Gizem

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content:
Never had been part of this because I never had known about this. How unfortunate!!! 😞
This time, no such mistake happens! All excited to be a part of this, to learn much more!

Thank you so much for giving this opportunity to all of us 😍.

- Bharathi

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One upgrade path - upgraded!
entry.content:
Hi @Gerardo_Gonzalez 
Thanks for sharing this point, indeed valuable input as it would require deviating from the Upgrade path in order to make use of the Localization migration utility which was only available only between version 2008 and 2011 inclusive.

We will review this scenario in more detail and make the necessary documentation changes in overview Note and Upgrade strategy guide once finalized.

Best Regards
Guy

entry.title: Entering SAP Signavio certification
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have been an SAP consultant for two years now Specializing in the SD module. I would like to expand my knowledge and dive deeper into the world of process management. I believe that the SAP certified associate-process management consultant certificate would be a great opportunity for me to kickstart my career path in this field of work. @David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Understanding Roles And Responsibility
entry.content:
Can you please point to the Excel version of the R&R? The original version was indeed an Excel (which you can easily see reading the PDF), but afaik SAP is not sharing this.

BR Frank

entry.title: Re: Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load...
entry.content: Apology! It was an oversight. Thanks for the highlight! 🙂

entry.title: Increasing Customer Influence: Product Enhancements for SAP CPQ Product
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, customer influence plays a pivotal role in shaping product development and enhancements. SAP CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) is no exception. By leveraging customer feedback and insights, SAP CPQ continuously evolves to meet the dynamic needs of its users. This blog explores how increasing customer influence drives product enhancements for SAP CPQ, ultimately leading to a more efficient and user-friendly solution.

SAP CPQ Customer Influence request ( 611 Requests as of 15th Aug 2024) 

SAP’s Customer Influence Programs

SAP has established several programs to harness customer influence effectively:

  • SAP Continuous Influence: This program allows customers to suggest improvements directly to SAP’s development teams. Customers can submit ideas, vote on suggestions, and receive updates on the status of their requests.
  • SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI): CEI provides early insights into new product developments. Customers can participate in sessions to provide feedback and shape new features.
  • SAP Integration Experience Feedback:This initiative focuses on the functional and architectural aspects of integrated business processes, allowing customers to test scenarios and provide feedback.

The Importance of Customer Influence Request

Customer influence is crucial for several reasons:

  1. Alignment with Sales User Needs: Direct feedback ensures that product enhancements align with the actual needs and pain points of users.
  2. Increased Adoption: When customers see their suggestions implemented, they are more likely to adopt and advocate for the product.
  3. Continuous Improvement: Ongoing feedback loops facilitate continuous improvement, keeping the product relevant and competitive.

SAP CPQ Roadmap

SAP Road Maps highlight innovations and provide a robust planning horizon to help detail the transformation journey.

Conclusion

Customer influence is a powerful driver of product enhancements for SAP CPQ. By actively involving customers in the development process, SAP ensures that its solutions remain relevant, efficient, and user-friendly. As SAP CPQ continues to evolve, customer feedback will remain at the heart of its innovation strategy, paving the way for a more responsive and effective sales solution.

entry.title: Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load an unsigned component.ORACLE12\Client64\bin\OCI
entry.content:
Hi,

  We have upgraded the SAP BO IDT from 4.3 SP3 Patch 7 to 4.3 SP3 Patch 11. However, when opening objects that uses the Oracle connection, we are prompted the error message "Error Execution was halted due to an attempt to load an unsigned component ORACLE12\Client64\bin\OCl.dll". The error will not happen if the IDT is 'Run as Administrator'. Note that we are using Oracle instant client. Anyone has experienced this? Thanks!

entry.title: No PO without PR
entry.content: I Want to restrict the user to not to create any PO without PR in SAP S4 HANA Pubic cloud

entry.title: Data Upload Starter Missing Clean/Replace Settings??
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been testing out the new "data upload" starter widget which can be added to stories. While this is in theory a great addition (as it can help avoid users accidentally clearing out the entire data model is the wrong setting is chosen, and love the ability for users to revert/publish!) it seems to be missing to very key settings (clean/replace version, and more importantly clean/replace subset of data). 

For most clients who use the file upload method, they need to ensure data debris is cleared out prior to uploading a new set of data. The "clean" options allow this to be automatically done, although there is a high risk of users using the "clean version" option and clearing out all of the data in the model, hence why this new feature was so long awaited.

I've tested out whether a data action could be embedded into a multi-action, but this doesn't seem to be possible at present to choose a file upload template in the "data import" step.

Therefore, the only option for my clients at present is to have 2 steps. 1) new data action where they can pick which areas to clear and then 2) data upload step. The "clear" data action in this method could be open to mistakes by the user by clearing too much/too little (whereas the clean/replace subset used to automatically handle this). This therefore feels like one step forwards and one step backwards with this new functionality.

Does anyone know of a solution to this that I may have missed?

If not, I've submitted an enhancement request - please vote if you would also like to see these two settings added to the new file upload widget process:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/329138

Thanks

David

entry.title: Re: Part 2 - Overview of SAP API Management Tools
entry.content: I think some of the terms need replacement? for instance i think there is no system anymore rather API Provider?
